# Original LEZAC.EXE level-7 (GRAN.MST) boss runtime evidence.
#
# Captured in-container after advancing through the original result/reload
# flow. Only the live bonus/destruction counters were set to their level-file
# targets; the original derived DS:79C5/79C6 and crossed the DS:2080 empty
# collapse-queue gate. Runtime DS was 0x0C8F.
#
# Actor table: DS:0x1BAE, 8 slots x 0x26 bytes. Slot 0 is reserved, slot 1 is
# the boss head, and slots 2..7 are the six segments. Link table: DS:0x79EA,
# 8 slots x 0x10 bytes. Slot 0 is reserved/stale, slots 1..6 are live segment
# links, and slot 7 is empty.
boss_runtime_original=level7
source=LEZAC.EXE via DOSBox /proc/mem runtime read
runtime_ds=0x0c8f
actor_table_offset=0x1bae
actor_entry_size=38
actor_slot_count=8
actor_index_base=1
actor_count=7
link_table_offset=0x79ea
link_entry_size=16
link_slot_count=8
link_index_base=1
link_count=6
visual_allocator_count=9
visual_rebase=2
head_visual=6
head_kind=0x1e
head_behavior=6
segment_kind=0x1f
segment_behavior=5
actor_table_
link_table_hex=020264ff2800040504050000b400020606070f52630009fcff0e0069000a000a0608125c71000927000f00fc0042000c060503ff01073ef4ff0a002901420107060403ff010760f9ff0a002e013c0107060303ff01077f2a000a005f01420107060203ff01072026000a005b0148010700000000000000000000000000000000
